_meta.purpose: Veo 3.1 prompts for the 6 Phase-3 work-grid case study video loops. Each video plays on card hover. All must be seamless loops, monochrome-leaning with teal brand accent only, and must NOT contain logos/text/faces.

shared_specs.rationale: 1080p (not 720p) because: retina displays render at 2x, case-study modals may render the video at ~800-1200px wide, and the incremental file cost (~2MB per clip) is worth the future-proofing. 16:9 is the agency standard and composes cleanly in a grid. 5s hits Veo's native sweet spot, loops cleanly, and gives enough personality without overstaying. 24fps matches the site's cinematic register. Audio is none — the site has its own ambient soundtrack.

shared_style_directive.palette_discipline: Monochrome-leaning. Pure black (#000000) or deep charcoal backgrounds. No saturated accent colors other than MindsAI brand teal #73C5CC — and only as a single rim highlight, reflection, or caustic hint. No warm oranges except where naturally motivated (amber liquid, tungsten interior, golden-hour). Never introduce magenta, cyan-beyond-teal, or chrome rainbow.
shared_style_directive.cinematography: Premium commercial tier. Slow deliberate camera moves (dolly, drift, lateral glide). Shallow depth of field f/1.4-f/2.8 equivalent. Motion-blurred highlights. Film grain present but subtle.
shared_style_directive.motion_speed: Slow. Half-speed of real-world pacing. Every move reads as intentional.
shared_style_directive.seamless_loop_rule: First frame must match last frame position/lighting so the video loops without a visible cut. Favour continuous motion that returns to origin over one-way pans.
shared_style_directive.exclusions: No logos, no typography, no human faces, no monitors/phones/screens, no stock clichés (binary code, rotating globes, circuit boards, glowing hexagons), no text overlays, no watermarks.

prompts.subject: Extreme close-up of a hand-stitched saddle-brown leather surface on a heritage armchair, with a single row of aged brass nailheads running diagonally across frame and a dark walnut wood trim edge at the right side of frame
prompts.action: Camera dollies slowly along the leather seam revealing the stitching texture; dust motes drift slowly through a warm golden key light entering from upper-left; fabric weave catches micro-reflections; at loop point, camera has returned to its origin so the motion continues seamlessly
prompts.style: Atelier craftsman aesthetic. Dieter Appelt stillness meets Wes Anderson controlled palette. Museum-grade artifact lit like a relic.
prompts.camera: Extreme macro close-up, horizontal dolly left-to-right then imperceptibly back, f/1.4 shallow depth of field, subtle parallax on wood edge, 4K sensor capture feel
prompts.lighting: Single warm tungsten key light from upper-left at 45°, deep unplugged shadows filling the right third of frame, imperceptible teal rim fill from camera-right to break pure shadow
prompts.color_palette: Charcoal (#1a1612) in shadows, saddle-brown leather mids, aged-brass highlights, a single sliver of teal (#73C5CC) rim on the deepest shadow edge, no other colors
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no clothing, no modern hardware

prompts.subject: A smooth travertine stone basin filled with still, shallow water; light caustic patterns from unseen overhead windows dance across the stone; the water surface is almost perfectly still with only the faintest ripple
prompts.action: Camera drifts slowly from overhead-angled left toward centre; a single water droplet falls from above in ultra-slow motion and creates expanding concentric ripples; caustic light patterns shift across the stone; at loop point the surface has returned to stillness
prompts.style: Aesop / Maison Zöe minimal-luxury spa. Serene, clinical-but-warm. Hiroshi Sugimoto contemplative.
prompts.camera: Overhead-tilted-down POV, slow lateral drift, 50mm equivalent, crystal-clear focus on water surface, motion-blurred droplet
prompts.lighting: Soft overhead daylight through unseen skylights, near-shadowless high-key, subtle teal caustic reflections on the stone around the basin edges
prompts.color_palette: Bone-white to warm-cream stone, clear water, gentle teal (#73C5CC) in caustic reflections, no other colors
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no hands, no medical instruments

prompts.subject: A Georgian Mayfair townhouse facade at deep blue twilight; pristine black front door with a polished brass knocker and a brass doorknob; one window to the right softly backlit by a warm interior tungsten lamp; wet cobblestones below reflecting the brass
prompts.action: Camera glides laterally from right to left in ultra-slow lateral dolly, compressing the facade via telephoto; warm window light flickers subtly once during the pass; at loop point the camera has continued past the door and subtly returns to start position imperceptibly
prompts.style: Ridley Scott Blade Runner meets Savile Row heritage. Quiet wealth. Monochromatic with one warm anchor.
prompts.camera: Steadicam lateral dolly right-to-left, 85mm equivalent telephoto compression, f/2, slight hand-breath motion
prompts.lighting: Blue-hour natural ambient (deep navy) plus one concealed warm tungsten source behind the right window creating an amber spill through fabric curtains, pool of light on wet pavement beneath
prompts.color_palette: Deep charcoal to night-blue for the facade, warm amber interior spill, brass highlights, teal (#73C5CC) reflected in wet cobblestones as the only accent
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no visible house numbers or street signage

prompts.subject: A heavy-bottom crystal tumbler containing amber spirit and two large ice spheres; liquid swirling in slow motion from a just-completed pour; condensation beads on the glass surface
prompts.action: Macro lens holds on the glass; liquid continues to swirl in slow motion revealing the spirit's colour depth; a single condensation bead rolls down the outside of the glass; ice cracks once with a microscopic shift; at loop end the swirl completes its cycle and begins again
prompts.style: Ogilvy-era spirits cinematography via Jonathan Glazer. Premium, heritage, masculine without being aggressive.
prompts.camera: Locked-off medium close-up, macro lens, f/2.8 with rack focus subtly between the glass surface and the liquid interior, slight breath in the handheld feel
prompts.lighting: Strong warm golden backlight behind the glass creating a halo and lighting the liquid from within; deep shadow on the camera side; a single teal rim highlight on the left edge of the glass
prompts.color_palette: Pure black background, amber-gold liquid, crystal-clear refractions, deep teal (#73C5CC) edge rim, no other colors
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no bottles with labels, no bar counter props

prompts.subject: Macro perspective of a raw-concrete architectural scale model featuring a cantilevered slab and a narrow vertical slot window; ground-level POV; sky backdrop is desaturated grey-blue twilight
prompts.action: Camera orbits in a slow arc around the base of the model; a directional low-angle golden light sweeps from camera-right to camera-left across the concrete, creating dramatic shadow play on the cantilever's underside; at loop end the light is back at its start position
prompts.style: Peter Zumthor reverence. Koyaanisqatsi pacing. Hélène Binet architectural photography made kinetic.
prompts.camera: Ground-level arc dolly, 85mm equivalent, f/2, slight tilt up, slow orbit
prompts.lighting: Low-angle golden-hour directional key from one side plus soft sky fill; strong hard shadows cast by the cantilever; teal cool-shadow undertones in the fill side
prompts.color_palette: Raw-concrete grey as mids, warm sand highlights, desaturated sky grey, subtle teal (#73C5CC) in the deep cool shadows, no other colors
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no blueprints visible, no modern CGI rendering look — this must feel physical and photographed

prompts.case_study: Aether Labs — B2B SaaS, Series A
prompts.subject: An obsidian-black glass horizontal surface with thin streams of teal light-particles flowing smoothly across it in multiple parallel lanes; the surface reflects the particles like a mirror; dark featureless void above
prompts.action: Camera glides very low along the surface from left to right; particle streams flow continuously in the opposite direction at varying speeds; a single brighter pulse travels right-to-left along one stream; at loop end the pulse wraps around and begins again on the same stream
prompts.style: Blade Runner 2049 interface aesthetic meets Anonymous Content minimal tech. Premium and calm — NOT corporate-SaaS. Not about data viz, about light.
prompts.camera: Ultra-low dolly along the glass surface, 35mm equivalent, f/2 with subtle focus breathing, shallow depth so streams far from camera soften
prompts.lighting: Single cold overhead ambient with the particle streams as the primary light source illuminating the glass; strong reflections on the mirror-surface double the visual density
prompts.color_palette: Pure black (#000000) void, obsidian-black reflective glass, teal (#73C5CC) particle streams as the sole light colour, one bright near-white pulse accent, no other colours
prompts.exclusions: No logos, no text, no faces, no monitors/screens/devices, no literal code characters, no UI elements, no grid lines, no data visualisations

generation_notes_for_abhishek.how_to_use: Feed each prompt object to Veo 3.1 as a natural-language description. Flatten the structured fields into prose — most important fields to emphasise in the prompt text: subject, action, camera, lighting, colour palette, seamless_loop requirement, exclusions. Set Veo's aspect_ratio=16:9 and duration=5s at the API level. Turn off person_generation.
generation_notes_for_abhishek.iteration_tips: If a first generation looks too colourful, re-prompt emphasising 'desaturated except for teal #73C5CC accent'. If it looks too corporate/generic, re-prompt emphasising the cinematographer/reference names in 'style'. If the loop has a jump cut, re-prompt emphasising 'continuous motion that returns to origin — first frame matches last frame'.
generation_notes_for_abhishek.drop_location: All 6 MP4s go under public/assets/veo/ with the exact filenames in output_path. I'll wire the lazy-load + hover playback into each case study card in Phase 3.
